description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CMake that runs on push to the master branch, on pull requests to the master branch, and on workflow dispatch. Use a matrix build job that runs on ubuntu-18.04 with different compilers (g++-7, g++-9, g++-10, clang++). For each matrix entry, check out the repository, configure CMake with the specified build type and compiler, build the project, and run tests with ctest.
